## Feature Description

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem This Solves

What user problem or limitation does this address?

## Proposed Behavior

How should the feature work in the app?

## Platform

**Relevant platform:** iOS / Android / macOS / Windows / Linux / All

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround you currently use, or write N/A.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, mockups, or links to similar features if useful.
